jsonLd.title: StayVista is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
StayVista invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of E-commerce Executive at our Pimpri-Chinchwad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About StayVista:
StayVista is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with StayVista!
